# missingEntitlements

**Type Property**

An error message that indicates missing entitlements in your app.

## Declaration

```swift
static var missingEntitlements: SCStreamError.Code { get }
```

## Privacy and entitlements

- **userDeclined**: An error message that indicates the user didn’t grant Screen Recording permission to your app.
